PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE FILED BY DEFENDANT CARRANZA, DOMINGA H. CARRANZA, LAZARO MENDOZA, RENE COLON, EDUARDO

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS DOMINGA CARRANZA, LAZARO CARRANZA, RENE MENDOZA AND EDUARDO COLON'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. MOVING DEFENDANTS HAVE MADE A THRESHOLD SHOWING THAT THE COMPLAINT (WHICH IS NOT DIVIDED INTO SEPARATE CAUSES OF ACTION) ARISES OUT OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY IN CALLING THE POLICE AND COMMUNICATIONS TO THE COURT IN CONNECTION WITH A PROTECTIVE ORDER. CCP 425.16(E)(1). THE BURDEN SHIFTED TO PLAINTIFF TO ESTABLISH A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON HIS CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE AN OPPOSITION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS DOMINGA CARRANZA & LAZARO CARRANZA's MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $7,086.34 PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16 is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Answers And Enter Defendats' Defaults
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SORIBA BANGOURA'S Motion To Strike Answers And Enter Defendats' Defaults is Off calendar as moot. On April 24, 2013, the court granted Defendants' Special Motion to Strike the Complaint. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MANUEL P. ALVAREZ, TEL. NO. 766-9617 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT DOMINGA CARRAZA;
EDUARDO COLON & RENE M. MENDOZA, DEFENDANTS APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DOMINGA CARRANZA, LAZARO CARRANZA, RENE MENDOZA AND EDUARDO COLON'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. Moving defendants have made a threshold showing that the Complaint (which is not divided into separate causes of action) arises out of protected activity in calling the police and communications to the court in connection with a protective order. CCP 425.16(e)(1). The burden shifted to Plaintiff to establish a probability of prevailing on his claims. Plaintiff did not file an opposition. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
